name: Smoke test: real Claude implements one tiny pure function

nodes.label: Claude implements formatDuration
nodes.prompt: Create a new file `src/utils/format-duration.ts` that exports a single pure function `formatDuration(ms: number): string`. The function must format a millisecond duration as a human-readable string: returns `"42ms"` when ms < 1000, `"3.2s"` when ms < 60000, `"4m 12s"` when ms < 3600000, and `"2h 5m"` otherwise. Use TypeScript strict types. Do not add any other files, do not modify any existing files, do not export anything else. Reply with the path you created and a one-line confirmation.
